title: AWS Step Functions State Machine Structure
description: Field structure documentation for AWS Step Functions state machine objects

fields.name: stateMachineArn
fields.description: AWS ARN uniquely identifying the state machine

fields.name: name
fields.description: State machine name (1-80 characters, no special chars)

fields.name: definition
fields.description: Amazon States Language JSON workflow definition

fields.name: roleArn
fields.description: IAM role ARN used during execution

fields.name: type
fields.description: Execution model: STANDARD for long-running, EXPRESS for high-volume
